problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Shape memory alloy phase transition may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
